governanceNotice: Governance change: modifying this file changes the structured gate-policy authority. Ordinary implementation tasks must not change it without task/ADR/decision evidence.

categoryDefinitions.boundary: Guards an architecture or package boundary invariant. Architecture review may cite this category as boundary evidence.
categoryDefinitions.local-consistency: Guards local formatting, mirrored declarations, generated/help text, or repository-local coherence. This category is useful but is not boundary evidence.
categoryDefinitions.smoke: Runs an end-to-end smoke or packaging/build smoke.
categoryDefinitions.release-policy: Guards release, package, supply-chain, runtime readiness, or publication policy.
categoryDefinitions.meta-governance: Guards governance surfaces such as PR body format, aggregate check composition, or CI gate topology.

tierDefinitions.pr-required: Runs in a GitHub branch-protection required context for pull requests.
tierDefinitions.main-only: Does not run in a PR required context; runs through full-check on main push, scheduled nightly, and manual workflow dispatch unless noted.
tierDefinitions.manual-only: Runs only by explicit local or workflow-dispatch invocation.

gates.tierReason: Full aggregate check is intentionally not a pull_request job; rewrite-ci runs it on main push, schedule, and workflow_dispatch.

allowlistPolicy.notes: Aggregate composition is governed by this manifest and package.json until G3 derives/checks it.

gates.tierReason: Local PR approximation script is not invoked by rewrite-ci; GitHub PRs use tiered jobs instead.
